question: For the battle plan under your arm, did you carry the physical papers to Sulaimaniyah, copy them, memorize them, or some combination?
answer:
Actually, as a lieutenant captain physician in the Iraqi army, I got a copy of the plan for myself. They gave me a copy, as well as all the other officers in the area. 

I carried those copies and went to the city of Sulaymaniyah, and through a messenger, I sent all the copies to the leadership of the attack (who was Fakhir Merghasuri, as I mentioned before). 

Five days later, I returned back to my area of Handrin, where we were fighting from the plains toward Handrin Mountain.
